rationale: Primary entity name field at the top of the Certificate of Cancellation.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The date the limited liability company's original certificate of formation was filed
rationale: Date the LLC was originally formed in Maine — anchor for verifying that cancellation is post-formation. Reuses the entity.formation_date key family used elsewhere across LLC/foreign-qualification forms.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The limited liability company is dissolved and the date of dissolution (if known) is
rationale: Date of internal dissolution (board/manager/member action) — distinct from the cancellation effective date which controls when SOS removes the LLC from the active records.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] the date of filing of this certificate
rationale: First mutually-exclusive option in the cancellation effective-date election. Enum value 'date_of_filing'. Unnamed widget at rect [102.1, 409.0, 117.1, 424.1] — empty field_id is preserved as-is upstream; fill engine matches by rect/widget index.

label_verbatim: THIRD: [ ] the future effective date as follows
rationale: Second mutually-exclusive option ('future_date'). Unnamed widget at rect [101.5, 384.1, 116.4, 399.3] — empty field_id is preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: the future effective date as follows: ___
rationale: Inline date blank for the future-effective-date option. Required only when cancellation.effective_date_type='future_date'.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ...set forth in Exhibit ___ attached and made a part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for additional information. Reuses the filing.additional_info_exhibit_letter key established on LP_MLPA-11C (same termination/cancellation-style 'other information' provision).
Date the cancellation certificate is signed. Distinct from cancellation.future_effective_date (which can be later) and entity.dissolution_date (which can be earlier).

Wet-ink signature line widget. Same convention as ASUM-5/MBCA-9: AcroForm template includes a /Tx field at the signature underline but Maine SOS expects wet-ink or scanned-image signatures, not typed text. Synth and rubric should leave this widget empty; signature is applied post-print. No canonical key assigned.

Combined name+capacity widget for the authorized signer — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. Same pattern as MLLC-12, MBCA-11. Capacity is broader than title (e.g., 'Authorized Person' under §1676.1.B/C is allowed).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($75 base per page-0 'Filing Fee $75.00' header plus expedite premium).
Filing-contact name.
Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
label_verbatim: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: Email address to use for annual report reminders
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: a cancelled LLC will not have annual reports going forward; this field on a cancellation filing is essentially advisory and may be left blank.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
